productDisplayName: Peter England Men Statements Brown Wallet
description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this wallet from peter england is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Peter England perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet.Dimensions: 10.6 cm x 9.3 cmTwo main compartmentsTwo slip pockets for coins on either sideThree card holder slots on the left sideButtoned pocket on the right sideBranding embossed on the frontCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
